mnemonics: Please Plan Everything Carefully, Roger Is Managing Our Project Successfully. (PPECRIMOPS for Planning, People, Estimation, Cost, Risk, Implementation, Monitoring, Quality, Procurement, Scheduling)
keyPoints: Project Planning: Defining scope, objectives, and the roadmap.
Resource Management: Allocating people, equipment, and budget.
Risk Management: Identifying and mitigating potential problems.
Project Scheduling: Creating timelines and milestones.
Cost Estimation and Budgeting: Predicting and controlling financial resources.
Quality Management: Ensuring the product meets defined standards.
Monitoring and Control: Tracking progress against the plan.
Configuration Management: Managing changes to project artifacts.
Communication Management: Facilitating information flow among stakeholders.
Project Closure: Formalizing acceptance and releasing deliverables.
commonMistakes: Underestimating the time and effort required for planning activities.
Neglecting risk management until a problem actually occurs.
Focusing only on the technical work and ignoring people management aspects like team dynamics and stakeholder communication.
